items.title: [正面] Very fun game, brings together a lot of very diffe...
items.summary:
Very fun game, brings together a lot of very different elements well. I'm surprised they balanced it so well.  
I couldn't recommend it before for translation issues, but recent fixes + direct communication from the translator team makes the recommendation easy.  
I recommend experimenting with teams, don't just copy a team from a tier list. 
If you are afraid of using resources badly, "Aequor" and "Caro" units work well with other members of their own class, "Chaos" work well with themselves or as wildcards in other teams, "Ultra" doesn't work well at all. But, it's a game, play "Ultra" if you want.

items.title: [正面] 8/10 , some UI make me uncomfortable because it to...
items.summary: 8/10 , some UI make me uncomfortable because it to small and wall-of-text, u'll get some bug if u fast click. However, gameplay - gacha - build - mechanic i love it. Would 10/10 when they fix those.
